contracts.shape: When `sworn board` omits `--release`, JSON is `{"releases":{"<release-name>":{"release":"<release-name>","sourceRef":"<fully-qualified-ref>","tracks":[...]}}}` with release-name keys in bytewise lexical order. Each record is derived by the shared all-ref catalog and contains the committed BoardState track projection selected from its stated sourceRef. `sourceRef` remains the TUI plan-topology authority; the CLI does not read ambient working-tree files, while S02 may render a farther advanced valid matching current-checkout status over this committed baseline. Named `sworn board --release <name> --json` retains its pre-release `{release,tracks}` shape.
contracts.rationale: The CLI aggregate and the TUI must not independently rediscover or rank refs. One catalog contract makes source selection observable and prevents divergent release lists, while keeping committed catalog discovery distinct from S02's bounded live-status display policy.
